summary: CP for NVDA sub-$100 question has been at exactly 0.15 for 10+ days. Threshold is strictly above 0.15. NVDA at ~$180, recently dropped from $192.
content: The CP for the underlying question (post 40972, "Will Nvidia's stock price close below $100 on any day in 2026?") has been at exactly 0.15 for 10+ consecutive readings since ~Jan 25. The meta-question asks if CP will be STRICTLY ABOVE 0.15 on Feb 12. NVDA is currently at ~$180, having dropped from ~$192 in late Jan. During a similar dip in Jan 20 ($178), CP rose to 0.17-0.18 but returned to 0.15 after recovery. 83 forecasters on the underlying question. NVDA 52-week low is $86.62 (below $100), so sub-$100 has recent precedent.
